CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '2') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '108') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '104') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '101') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '106') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '115') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '51') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '110') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '111') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '114') , StartDate, IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '116') , StartDate, null)))))))))))
CustomField.label: VIZ StartDate
